description: An outdoor photograph of a single metal flagpole carrying two flags flying at half-staff against a vivid blue sky with light clouds. The upper flag is the American flag; below it flies the Alaska state flag (dark blue field with the gold Big Dipper and North Star). The pole is topped with antennas/aerials, and a row of autumn-colored evergreen and deciduous trees lines the bottom of the frame. There is no on-image text, logo, or graphic treatment of any kind. The tweet caption reads 'AMERICA FIRST.'
